courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Procedural Mesh or Tile Generation Game
genericDescription: Generate geometry, tiles, normals, UVs, collision, or adjacency data through code; validate generated content.
specificDescription: Build a game with a generated terrain, city block, cave, island, board, path network, or tactical map. Include seed support and a validation pass that rejects or repairs unplayable output.
gradingRubric: 30 pts generation algorithm; 20 pts geometry/data correctness; 20 pts playability of generated content; 15 pts seed and validation tools; 15 pts reflection.
